steps.title: Find P(C)
steps.content: Total visitors $= 375$. Since every visitor is in room A, B, or C, the probabilities sum to 1. So $P(C) = 1 - 0.64 - 0.32 = 0.04$.

steps.title: Compute the count in room C
steps.content:
Multiply by the total to get the count in room C:
$$0.04 \times 375 = 15$$
Choice B matches.
